---
name: agents
description: Custom agents for the Pokémon card scanner webapp project
---

# Project Agents

This workspace contains three specialized agents for managing the webapp development workflow:

- **developer** - Identifies issues, implements fixes, creates PRs, and handles review feedback
- **reviewer** - Reviews PRs, runs tests, and merges approved changes
- **project-owner** - Discusses goals, requirements, and provides project guidance
